violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed wearing jewelry on arms and/or hands during food preparation. Employee working with food items has multiple wrist bracelets.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wiping cloth bucket sanitizer concentration too weak. Water dirty. Change as needed.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Ice buildup in reach in freezer needs cleaning. Food debris in reach in prep table cooler needs cleaning.
Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Employee unable to locate test strips.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors have debris buildup under shelving units in walk in cooler & walk in freezer. Needs cleaning. Floor around ice machine need cleaning.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
